name: Eddie Munson
description:
Blind date?

Little shi Henderson had gotten him a date for February 14th and he had no idea what to expect. Would it go well? Or would everything go to hell?

Valentine's Day Special💖

get freaky y'all!!

AU where Eddie survives the Upside Down

A little Loser x User...

This is the first bot of 4 that I am preparing for valentine's day, I still have 3 of them to finish. I also have 2 more, one from Eddie and one from Stuart Pot. I thought I should start taking requests, so I made a form! By the way, many thanks to the 6 little people who have followed me!!!!! I love you guys!!!
